name: clara-lina-clara-roundtrip
description: Smoke test for Clara routing to Lina, Lina handling a retention scenario, and Lina returning the caller to Clara cleanly.

userTurns.label: Follow-up scenario
userTurns.text: Lina, show me a follow-up for a customer who missed an estimate appointment and is now going cold.

userTurns.label: Return to Clara
userTurns.text: Please send me back to Clara.

userTurns.label: Receptionist follow-up
userTurns.text: Clara, stay with me and show the receptionist demo.
